home.title: Welcome!
home.name: Shaders
home.disc: This is the Project's Main Page

project1.name: Vertex Playground
project1.disc: An interactive environment for working with geometry, allowing real-time vertex deformation and object structure design

project2.name: Fragment Lab
project2.disc: An experimental environment for working with pixels, colors, noise, textures, and post-processing effects

project3.name: Uniform Control
project3.disc: A real-time shader parameter control panel with interactive sliders and dynamic values

project4.name: Noise Field
project4.disc: A generative environment for exploring procedural noise and motion patterns based on Perlin and Simplex algorithms

project5.name: Shader Viewer
project5.disc: A final rendering mode with a clean output view, free of UI elements, designed to showcase the result

about.title: Shaders
about.more02: ⚡ Shaders is an interactive environment for exploring Vertex and Fragment Shaders in real time, where code is instantly transformed into visual output. 🎨
about.more03: 🧠 The project combines modules for working with geometry, pixels, noise, and scene parameters, allowing flexible control over visual logic and graphical behavior. 🔧
about.more04: 🚀 Built on WebGPU and TSL, it serves as a tool for prototyping, experimentation, and creating visual solutions that can be applied in modern web products and commercial interfaces. 🌐
about.name: About
